name: Davy Jones Tuna Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Grease a 9x9-inch pan.
2. In a bowl, mix Bisquick, milk, eggs, salt, and pepper. Beat vigorously for 30 seconds.
3. Stir in the drained tuna, shredded cheese, diced onion, chopped pimientos, and chopped celery until combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and sprinkle the remaining shredded cheese on top.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Serve hot with Tuna Celery Sauce.
Tuna Celery Sauce:
1. In a small saucepan, mix cream of celery soup, milk, and remaining tuna. Heat through.
